headline: Global Pectin Market Set for Steady Expansion as Innovation and Clean-Label Demand Reshape Industry | Future Market Insights (FMI)
summary: According to the latest market analysis by Future Market Insights, the global pectin market is undergoing a structural transformation driven by enzymatic innovations and the rapid expansion of plant-based and pharmaceutical applications. Valued at USD 1,125.9 million in 2025, the market is projected to surge to USD 2,074.2 million by 2035. Expanding at a steady 6.3% CAGR, the industry is unlocking new revenue streams through 'waste-to-value' citrus processing and high-performance specialty grade

headline: DuPont Expands FilmTec™ Fortilife™ Portfolio for Advanced ZLD/MLD and resource recovery applications
summary: DuPont (NYSE: DD) today announced the launch of two new reverse osmosis membrane elements – FilmTec™ Fortilife™ XC-Max UHP element and FilmTec™ Fortilife™ XC220 element – designed to help industrial customers improve water recovery and optimize Zero Liquid Discharge (ZLD) and Minimal Liquid Discharge (MLD) system performance.

headline: DD Expands Water Solutions With Inge UF Integrated Pre-Filter Modules
summary: DuPont unveils Inge UF modules with integrated pre-filter, cutting footprint and costs while boosting efficiency, compatibility and resilience.
